Does your landlord want your Aadhaar, PAN or salary slips? Documents that you are required to share
description: Renting a house? Landlords often ask for extensive financial documents, but the Model Tenancy Act of 2021 clarifies tenant obligations. Only basic identification like Aadhaar and PAN cards are legally required for the Rent Authority. Financial history such as salary slips and bank statements are not mandatory under the Act, though landlords may use them for private vetting. Remember, states must adopt this framework for it to be legally binding.

Is your landlord not returning security deposit? Know your rights and what counts as ‘damage’
description: Resolving security deposit disputes in India is all about knowing your rights as a tenant and the duties of landlords. The law makes a clear distinction between normal wear and tear—covered by landlords—and tenant-caused damages. To support claims for deductions, landlords must provide strong evidence, including photos and receipts, to facilitate a fair and efficient resolution between parties involved.

title: Anthropic's 3k employees have one question after US 'banned' its most powerful AI models
description: Anthropic's 3,000 employees are still confused nearly a week after the White House gave the company under 90 minutes to pull its most powerful AI models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, over vague national security concerns. As The New York Times reported from internal chats, staff suspect they're being targeted rather than reviewed. Triggered by an Amazon paper, the shutdown has left engineers asking whether the Trump administration simply doesn't want Anthropic to exist.

description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi led International Yoga Day celebrations in Kolkata, emphasizing "Yoga for Healthy Ageing" and its role in maintaining physical and mental well-being. Across India, Union ministers and chief ministers participated in mass yoga sessions, highlighting yoga's global reach and its contribution to a healthier, more vibrant nation. The day marked a collective global celebration of yoga's benefits.

His stellar knock, coupled with Rohit Sharma's 79, guided India to a commanding nine-wicket victory and a 3-0 series whitewash.  Prasidh Krishna's five-wicket haul earlier restricted Afghanistan to 218, setting the stage for Jaiswal's record-breaking performance.

Why India, among largest economies, doesn’t rank in top 50 world’s most powerful passports
description: Despite India's robust economic growth, its passport ranks surprisingly low globally, hovering around the 80th position. This reflects a slower expansion of visa-free access compared to other nations. Factors like diplomatic ties, reciprocal agreements, and perceived security influence rankings, not just economic might. India's progress is gradual, requiring strategic diplomatic efforts and strengthened internal systems to boost international trust and improve its travel freedom.

title: 'We don't get to choose..': What Google CEO Sundar Pichai advices to students
description: Google CEO Sundar Pichai, addressing Stanford's Class of 2026, urged graduates to embrace optimism and tackle challenging endeavors. He shared personal anecdotes, emphasizing that meaningful work stems from genuine passion rather than external expectations. Pichai's core message highlighted the importance of perseverance and continuous forward movement, regardless of life's inevitable uncertainties.

title: Happy Father’s Day 2026: Top 50 wishes, messages and quotes to make dad feel special
description: Fathers often express love through actions, not words, and Father's Day on June 21, 2026, is a time to appreciate their guidance and support. Simple gestures like cooking a favorite meal or sharing memories can mean more than gifts. This day is about acknowledging their sacrifices and letting them know they are deeply appreciated.
